title: Perfect Effect
description: Modpack that improves vanilla minecraft, but does not affect its most important parts of gameplay. Generation, dungeons, and balance(and of course better visuals >.<)
body:
### Modpack that improves vanilla Minecraft.
When creating this modpack, it was decided not to stray far from the vanilla style and gameplay.
The modpack has updated generation(such as new and enlarged biomes), and added new dungeons.
There are also some minor fixes. And of course, the visuals were updated.
![land](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/HjywhQxv/images/ac27c72a2d88dad77bd1002c55c1dd5501281884.png)
### Cool vanilla-like resourcepacks included
I added cool vanilla-like resourcepacks, which are well suited to the vanilla style

### Future plans
I'm thinking of adding more cool little things to the build and adding more mods for a change
